skill1.kitLine: Activates when normal attack hits. Affects the target(s). Deals 3.05% of final ATK as additional damage.
skill1.where: skill1[0] — trigger hitCount count:1, target enemy, effect flatDamage atkPct 3.05
skill1.note: Encoded as a per-hit flatDamage rider (count:1 = fires 2x/pull = per HIT at hitsPerShot 2), NOT extraHitDamagePct, deliberately to preserve the U1 crit-ON default and the skillGauge-per-proc gauge economy. Crit-ON by engine default.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when normal attack hits 200 time(s). Affects self. Critical Damage ▲ 14.25%, stacks up to 5 time(s) and lasts for 10 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[1] — trigger hitCount count:200, target self, effect buff critDamagePct 14.25 dur 10 maxStacks 5

skill1.kitLine: Max Ammunition Capacity ▼ 5.04%, stacks up to 5 time(s) and lasts for 10 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[1] — same block, effect buff maxAmmoPct -5.04 dur 10 maxStacks 5
skill1.note: Kit-verbatim. Ammo DOWN = shorter mags = more reloads = fewer shots; engine clips live via maxAmmo() (5 stacks: 300→~224).

skill2.kitLine: Affects all allies. Activates when entering Full Burst. Hit Rate ▲ 8.56% for 15 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[0] — trigger fullBurstEnter, target allies, effect buff hitRatePct 8.56 dur 15
skill2.note: MODELED but INERT in the engine today (⚑2). Encoded so the stat exists for a future core-rate consumer and so S2b's gate is visible. Hard rule 4: Hit Rate raises core-hit rate, magnitude measured-only.

skill2.kitLine: Affects self. Activates when normal attack hits 200 time(s) during increasing Hit Rate status. ATK ▲ 29.38% for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1] — trigger hitCount count:200, target self, fbGate inFb, effect buff atkPct 29.38 dur 10
skill2.note: 'during increasing Hit Rate status' gate approximated as fbGate:'inFb' (⚑3) — engine has no while-buff-active gate. Exact when Modernia bursts (extended FB ≡ 15s status); undercounts 5s tail when another B3 bursts; hit counter accrues ungated (kit counts only in-status hits) → net small over-accrual. Prior materialized file was UNGATED (near-permanent over-credit); gate is text-driven, not a board-cooling fudge.

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Full Burst Duration ▲ 5 sec.
burst.where: burst[0] — trigger burstCast, target allies, effect fullBurstExtend seconds 5
burst.note: burstCast trigger is hard-rule-6 correct: fires only when SHE bursts. Hand-authored slot, preserved verbatim.

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Unlimited ammunition for 15 sec.
burst.where: burst[1] — trigger burstCast, target self, effect unlimitedAmmo durationSec 15

burst.kitLine: Destroy Mode: Extends her line of sight and auto-aims at all enemies within range. The stage target is treated as a single enemy regardless of whether it has parts (including interruption parts).
burst.note: Inert vs the single partless scope-lock boss — auto-aim/line-of-sight/parts-consolidation clause has no effect in scope-lock. Documented skip, not a silent drop.

burst.kitLine: Deals 2.24% of final ATK as damage for 15 sec.
burst.where: burst[1] — same block, effect buff extraHitDamagePct 2.24 dur 15
burst.note: Hand-authored Destroy Mode fix: per-hit +2.24% final ATK for 15s via extraHitDamagePct (old parser read it as a 1/s DoT, massively undercounting at MG hit rates). Rides the crit:false path — U1 says function additional damage crits (⚑4, unreconciled).

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑1 skill1: reload tuple is unverified datamine — reloadFrames 159 + rolling-reload (reload_start_ammo 299); raw shot_detail says reload_time 230 in its own units.
documentedConfounds.why: Open measurement on a shared engine cadence constant, not a Modernia-specific modeling choice with a known directional bias. Affects shot count symmetrically; flagged unverified, not known-wrong. Needs a focus-video reload gap read.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑2 skill2: Hit Rate ▲ 8.56% is modeled but INERT in the engine — it raises the core-hit rate by an unmeasured magnitude (hard rule 4).
documentedConfounds.why: If/when hitRatePct lifts core-hit rate, Modernia gains core hits she is not currently credited for → warms the reading. The ks-extract 0.88 masking-case finding explicitly names 'hitRatePct→core-hit-rate (backlog engine-gap #2)' as a candidate cause of her COLD reading. Currently a pure under-credit.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑3 skill2: ATK ▲ 29.38% 'during increasing Hit Rate status' gate approximated as in-Full-Burst; counter accrues ungated.
documentedConfounds.why: Second-order and mixed: exact when Modernia herself bursts (the graded comp), undercounts the 5s post-FB tail when another B3 bursts (under-credit) while ungated counter accrual slightly over-credits activations. Net described as small over-accrual; roughly neutral on her own burst rotations.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑4 burst: Destroy Mode per-hit 2.24% modeled crit-OFF (extraHitDamagePct); U1 says function additional damage crits. Also datamined ChangeWeapon (shot 1026002) fire profile assumed identical to base MG.
documentedConfounds.why: If the 2.24% stream should crit at caster rate, she is under-credited by ~critRate×critDmg on that stream → warms the reading (ks-extract: 'would warm; not pulled'). Swapped-weapon cadence/multiplier deltas are an additional unverified unknown folded into the same finding.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: Destroy Mode auto-aim / line-of-sight / parts-consolidation clause.
documentedConfounds.why: Inert against the single partless scope-lock boss by construction — no damage-path effect in scope-lock. Documented inert skip.

documentedConfounds.text: Board COLD reading (0.868, n=1) is confounded by comp: the 2026-07-17 0.88 masking-case traced part of the drop to naga's removed phantom with-shielder team buff (coreDamagePct 85.17 + burst casterAtkPct to all allies) that had been propping Modernia in N2 (1.0437→0.8807), exposing her own under-model (helm/crown masking pattern).
documentedConfounds.why: The single board point is a residual confounded by a teammate's removed buff plus the FB-count anomaly, not a clean isolated read. The direction of the exposed under-model (missing core-rate lift ⚑2 + crit-OFF Destroy Mode ⚑4) is HOT; the number itself should not be over-interpreted at n=1.

authorIntentSummary: The override is a PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS, not validated): skill1/skill2 were machine-authored (wave 6, 2026-07-16) while the burst slot is HAND-AUTHORED and preserved verbatim — its key fix re-models Destroy Mode's 2.24% as a per-hit extraHitDamagePct rider (the parser had misread it as a 1/s DoT, catastrophic at MG hit rates) plus unlimitedAmmo 15s and a team fullBurstExtend +5s on a hard-rule-6 burstCast trigger. S1's 3.05% rider is deliberately a crit-ON flatDamage block (not extraHitDamagePct) to keep the U1 crit and gauge economy; S2b's 'during increasing Hit Rate status' gate is approximated as fbGate:'inFb' (text-driven, fixing a prior ungated near-permanent over-credit). Known-not-yet-faithful spots: Hit Rate is modeled but INERT (⚑2, would warm), Destroy Mode rides crit-OFF against U1's crits finding (⚑4, would warm), the reload tuple is unverified datamine (⚑1), and the auto-aim/parts clause is an inert documented skip — the two HOT gaps line up with the confounded COLD 0.868 n=1 board read.
